Dance

1 per season block(s)

Prereq: No prior dance experience required.

Play (Fall Production)

1 per season block(s)

Prereq: Auditions are held during student orientation for actors. Students interested in stage management and assistant directing must seek prior approval from the Arts Department.

Musical (Winter Production)

1 per season block(s)

Prereq: Audition required for actors. Students interested in stage management and assistant directing must seek prior approval from the Arts Department.

Theater Showcase

1 per season block(s)

Prereq: None

Prereq: None

Advanced Weight Training

1 per season block(s)

Swimming for Conditioning

1 per season block(s)

Prereq: Geared towards students that are advanced level swimmers or have completed one year on the varsity swim team.

Mad Aquatics

1 per season block(s)

Prereq: Geared toward Varsity level swimmers.

Tennis 101

1 per season block(s)

Prereq: None

Advanced Tennis

1 per season block(s)

Prereq: Students must have a basic knowledge of the game and perform the basic strokes required for match play.
